VredX Texture Baking — Third-Party Notice
===========================================

Texture baking in VredX uses the MaterialX library from the Academy Software
Foundation (ASWF), distributed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

MaterialX Project:
  https://github.com/AcademySoftwareFoundation/MaterialX

Copyright notices and license terms for the bundled MaterialX runtime are
provided in LICENSE-ASWF-MaterialX.txt in this directory.

The ASWF runtime files under materialx/ are vendor binaries and are not
modified by VredX. VredX-owned glue code (baketextures_runner.py, engine.py)
invokes the upstream TextureBaker API via subprocess.
